item.title: 広告まみれでちゃんと読めないサイトとか、見知らぬ他人が喧嘩するように設計されたSNSとか、デマとAIまみれの動画サイトと…
item.author: クワハリ (@kuwahali.bsky.social)
item.description:
広告まみれでちゃんと読めないサイトとか、見知らぬ他人が喧嘩するように設計されたSNSとか、デマとAIまみれの動画サイトとかほんとになんなんだよ。全く慣れてなくてずっと新鮮にムカついてる
あの時代は本当に狂ってたなって後世言われるようになることを願うことしかできない
item.content:encoded:
広告まみれでちゃんと読めないサイトとか、見知らぬ他人が喧嘩するように設計されたSNSとか、デマとAIまみれの動画サイトとかほんとになんなんだよ。全く慣れてなくてずっと新鮮にムカついてる
あの時代は本当に狂ってたなって後世言われるようになることを願うことしかできない

をお届け👼🏻‎

#メンズエステ#東京メンズエステ#メンズエステ新宿#メンエス#メンエス東京#メンエス新宿

item.author: チムニー (@chimney1022.bsky.social)

item.title: ‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ ‎ ‎早朝で腹も減り ‎コンビニで買った握り飯を… ‎ ‎『お父さん、待って！』 ‎ ‎『…
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ
‎
‎早朝で腹も減り
‎コンビニで買った握り飯を…
‎
‎『お父さん、待って！』
‎
‎『魚がお腹いっぱいになる』
‎
‎『釣れるまで辛抱して』
‎
‎『これ釣り師の心得だよ』
‎
‎「へぇ〜」と返事したが…
‎
‎お嬢さん…
‎８年お供してますがね…
‎初耳ですぞ！
‎
‎てか…
‎好きな明太握りが売切れで…
‎ワシを恨んでますね😂
‎
‎しばらくすると…
‎
‎『お父さん、おにぎり食べよう』
‎
‎「えっ…釣り師の心得は？」
‎
‎『今日は釣れなそうだから』
‎
‎へぇ〜空腹だよね？お嬢さん…🤣
‎
‎
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ
‎
‎早朝で腹も減り
‎コンビニで買った握り飯を…
‎
‎『お父さん、待って！』
‎
‎『魚がお腹いっぱいになる』
‎
‎『釣れるまで辛抱して』
‎
‎『これ釣り師の心得だよ』
‎
‎「へぇ〜」と返事したが…
‎
‎お嬢さん…
‎８年お供してますがね…
‎初耳ですぞ！
‎
‎てか…
‎好きな明太握りが売切れで…
‎ワシを恨んでますね😂
‎
‎しばらくすると…
‎
‎『お父さん、おにぎり食べよう』
‎
‎「えっ…釣り師の心得は？」
‎
‎『今日は釣れなそうだから』
‎
‎へぇ〜空腹だよね？お嬢さん…🤣
‎
‎
‎
‎

item.title: Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife S…
item.author: Paul van der Meer (@paulvandermeer.bsky.social)
item.description:
Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium the White House confirmed.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino said he and Tr*mp will deliver the FIFA World Cup trophy to the winning team's captain on the field.

METLIFE STADIUM
YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO
item.content:encoded:
Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium the White House confirmed.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino said he and Tr*mp will deliver the FIFA World Cup trophy to the winning team's captain on the field.

METLIFE STADIUM
YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO

item.title: #ヤニねこ 佐藤ヤニ子 作画、顔、以外全てが汚いアニメだと思いますw 獣人という可愛い創作キャラをここまでする発想は尊敬…

#佐藤ヤニ子 #二次創作 #イラスト
#ヤニ子 #タバコ #絵描きさんと繋がりたい

item.content:encoded: The incoming UK leader faces pressure to balance energy security, jobs and climate goals.

item.title: イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754…
item.author: バーナム博物館長 (@barnummuseum.bsky.social)
item.description:
イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754～68年にジョン・ウッドの設計で建てられました。建物はルネサンス風ジョージアン様式で建てられており、優雅な円型を描く建物の列が印象的です。この建物はBBCの某番組で英国最高の建物の一つに選ばれました。
#アート #近代建築
item.content:encoded:
イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754～68年にジョン・ウッドの設計で建てられました。建物はルネサンス風ジョージアン様式で建てられており、優雅な円型を描く建物の列が印象的です。この建物はBBCの某番組で英国最高の建物の一つに選ばれました。
#アート #近代建築

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called Wh…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called White Creek, and it looks awesome! The game is a third person shooter that mirrors the vibe of PS1 horror games, it's a total throwback that looks like a ton of fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called White Creek, and it looks awesome! The game is a third person shooter that mirrors the vibe of PS1 horror games, it's a total throwback that looks like a ton of fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 7月19日 日曜日☁☀️ 室温33.2℃ １勤目終了なり。。。 暑い🫠 外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠 エアコン取り…
item.author: 菊理（くくり） (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月19日 日曜日☁☀️
室温33.2℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
暑い🫠
外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠
エアコン取り付け業者とこちらの休みの都合が合わない…
いったいいつになったら新しいエアコン取り付けてくれるんだろう…🫠
しんどいぞ…🥵

今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🥤
明日も頑張ろう…🫠
item.content:encoded:
7月19日 日曜日☁☀️
室温33.2℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
暑い🫠
外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠
エアコン取り付け業者とこちらの休みの都合が合わない…
いったいいつになったら新しいエアコン取り付けてくれるんだろう…🫠
しんどいぞ…🥵

今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🥤
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

item.title: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets.
item.content:encoded: Just because you live in a small place doesn't mean it has to look or feel cramped. Interior designers share creative strategies to create the illusion of space that work for renters and small budgets.

item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)

item.content:encoded:

item.title: The Odyssey, the new movie from blockbuster auteur director …
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
The Odyssey, the new movie from blockbuster auteur director Christopher Nolan, was the No. 1 film in the US and Canada over the weekend with $124.5 million in ticket sales. Read more: bloom.bg/4pwMc0v

📷️: Melinda Sue Gordon/Universal Pictures
item.content:encoded:
The Odyssey, the new movie from blockbuster auteur director Christopher Nolan, was the No. 1 film in the US and Canada over the weekend with $124.5 million in ticket sales. Read more: bloom.bg/4pwMc0v

📷️: Melinda Sue Gordon/Universal Pictures

item.title: "Congress is yet again flirting with eliminating the United …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: "Congress is yet again flirting with eliminating the United States’ twice-yearly ritual of changing the clocks by an hour — this time, by making Daylight Saving Time permanent," writes Aaron Blake. | Analysis
item.content:encoded: "Congress is yet again flirting with eliminating the United States’ twice-yearly ritual of changing the clocks by an hour — this time, by making Daylight Saving Time permanent," writes Aaron Blake. | Analysis

item.title: #🔖学び 激レア隕石、ニュージャージー州のアマチュア天文家が住む民家に落下 | ギズモード・ジャパン 落ちたのが偶然…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖学び
激レア隕石、ニュージャージー州のアマチュア天文家が住む民家に落下 | ギズモード・ジャパン

落ちたのが偶然にもアマチュア天文家の家だったとこまで奇跡！ 2年前、ひとつの隕石が地球の大気圏を突き抜け、アメリカ・ニュージャージー州の民家に落下しました。その隕石の破片を分析した結果、太陽系が誕生した頃の姿のままの、希少で原始的な小惑星から来たものかもしれないことが明らかになったのです。 火球が目...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖学び
激レア隕石、ニュージャージー州のアマチュア天文家が住む民家に落下 | ギズモード・ジャパン

落ちたのが偶然にもアマチュア天文家の家だったとこまで奇跡！ 2年前、ひとつの隕石が地球の大気圏を突き抜け、アメリカ・ニュージャージー州の民家に落下しました。その隕石の破片を分析した結果、太陽系が誕生した頃の姿のままの、希少で原始的な小惑星から来たものかもしれないことが明らかになったのです。 火球が目...

item.title: As he prepares for the World Cup final, Lamine Yamal, the ch…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: As he prepares for the World Cup final, Lamine Yamal, the child of a Moroccan father and an Equatorial Guinean mother who was born and raised in Spain, is at the heart of a national debate about what it means to be Spanish in an increasingly multicultural society.
item.content:encoded: As he prepares for the World Cup final, Lamine Yamal, the child of a Moroccan father and an Equatorial Guinean mother who was born and raised in Spain, is at the heart of a national debate about what it means to be Spanish in an increasingly multicultural society.

item.title: 5 weeks ago Espresso Martini was poisoned and left for dead.…
item.author: Niall Harbison (@niallharbison.bsky.social)
item.description:
5 weeks ago Espresso Martini was poisoned and left for dead.

We've been working very hard and today she is back running.

Unbelievable scenes!
item.content:encoded:
5 weeks ago Espresso Martini was poisoned and left for dead.

We've been working very hard and today she is back running.

Unbelievable scenes!

item.title: “In these incredibly divisive political times, we’re actuall…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
“In these incredibly divisive political times, we’re actually seeing the rare issue that unites Americans: opposition to government surveillance.

And I don’t think it’s going anywhere. I think this movement is only going to grow.”
item.content:encoded:
“In these incredibly divisive political times, we’re actually seeing the rare issue that unites Americans: opposition to government surveillance.

And I don’t think it’s going anywhere. I think this movement is only going to grow.”

item.title: "It's Rainy" - my oil painting
item.author: Andrii Frolov (@artandriifrolov.bsky.social)
item.description: "It's Rainy" - my oil painting
item.content:encoded: "It's Rainy" - my oil painting

item.title: A lawyer in the Texas comptroller’s office said he believed …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
A lawyer in the Texas comptroller’s office said he believed allegations against Islamic private schools made by Sam Westrop — who once had to pay damages for making false claims — appeared credible.

When asked, he said he never Googled Westrop.

with @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
A lawyer in the Texas comptroller’s office said he believed allegations against Islamic private schools made by Sam Westrop — who once had to pay damages for making false claims — appeared credible.

When asked, he said he never Googled Westrop.

with @texastribune.org

item.title: Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide…
item.author: The Washington Post (@washingtonpost.com)
item.description:
Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide to have received a new type of gene-editing therapy that has functionally cured him of sickle cell disease.

For Cressy, this meant that he could finally pursue his dream of becoming a pilot.
item.content:encoded:
Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide to have received a new type of gene-editing therapy that has functionally cured him of sickle cell disease.

For Cressy, this meant that he could finally pursue his dream of becoming a pilot.

item.title: The president no longer treats the people who defeated him a…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: The president no longer treats the people who defeated him as voters. He treats them as suspects
item.content:encoded: The president no longer treats the people who defeated him as voters. He treats them as suspects

item.title: When Argentina won their semi-final, their players helf up a…
item.author: Marcus Chown (@marcuschown.bsky.social)
item.description:
When Argentina won their semi-final, their players helf up a banner saying the Falklands/Malvinas belong to Argentina.

If Spain win the final - which I really hope they do - it would be great if they would hold up a banner saying…

RELEASE THE EPSTEIN FILES!
item.content:encoded:
When Argentina won their semi-final, their players helf up a banner saying the Falklands/Malvinas belong to Argentina.

If Spain win the final - which I really hope they do - it would be great if they would hold up a banner saying…

RELEASE THE EPSTEIN FILES!

item.title: Prince Harry's mood ahead of his private reunion with King C…
item.author: The Mirror (@mirror.co.uk)
item.description: Prince Harry's mood ahead of his private reunion with King Charles has been revealed, after a royal expert shared details of the Duke of Sussex's demeanour before the highly anticipated family meeting.
item.content:encoded: Prince Harry's mood ahead of his private reunion with King Charles has been revealed, after a royal expert shared details of the Duke of Sussex's demeanour before the highly anticipated family meeting.

item.title: I understand that it sucks to have to read a book you didn't…
item.author: Sara Century (@saracentury.bsky.social)
item.description: I understand that it sucks to have to read a book you didn't choose as a kid but when people are like 40 and still going, "well assigned reading turned me off from reading" it's like, ok but you're 40. No one has assigned you a book in like 20 years.
item.content:encoded: I understand that it sucks to have to read a book you didn't choose as a kid but when people are like 40 and still going, "well assigned reading turned me off from reading" it's like, ok but you're 40. No one has assigned you a book in like 20 years.

item.title: *Taps claws on skyscraper glass* Hey, come on out, before I…
item.author: Switch 🐾 🔜 MP (@switchmegawolf.bsky.social)
item.description:
*Taps claws on skyscraper glass*

Hey, come on out, before I reach in. :3 ☠️

Painting done by @blackestmanamultis.bsky.social!
item.content:encoded:
*Taps claws on skyscraper glass*

Hey, come on out, before I reach in. :3 ☠️
